thesis: A high-quality, diversified retail lender compounding book value with strong and still-rising analyst revisions; size it up as a core financial.
falsification: Revisions roll over, asset-quality/credit-cost guidance is cut, or the stock lags peer NBFCs over the next quarter.

thesis: Volume-led diagnostics recovery with improving margins and rising revisions; hold at conviction weight.
falsification: Price competition compresses margins or revisions fade and the recovery stalls.

thesis: Integrated aluminium/Novelis play, reasonably valued with rising revisions; the cyclical tilt is supported by the analyst trend, not just commodity hope.
falsification: Aluminium/LME prices roll over, Novelis spreads compress, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Granular, high-growth affordable-housing lender with rising revisions and a long runway; hold as a core small-cap financial.
falsification: NIM compression, rising delinquencies, or revisions turn down.

thesis: Margin-recovery story under new management with rising revisions; the best-positioned of my IT names for upgrades.
falsification: Discretionary IT demand weakens, margin recovery stalls, or revisions fade.

thesis: Dominant PepsiCo bottler with international expansion and rising revisions; structural volume growth.
falsification: A weak summer/monsoon season, margin pressure, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Pre-sales-led residential and annuity developer with rising revisions; the housing up-cycle has further to run.
falsification: Pre-sales momentum slows, rates rise, or revisions turn down.

thesis: Asset-light health-claims platform riding insurance penetration with rising revisions; lift from a starter position.
falsification: Client concentration loss, regulatory pricing pressure, or revisions fade.

thesis: Highest-quality large private bank with consistent ROA and a modest cheapness tilt; core overweight financial.
falsification: NIM compression, asset-quality slippage, or it lags the bank index materially.

thesis: Re-rating private bank with improving return profile and a slight cheapness edge; hold as a second core bank.
falsification: Credit costs rise, deposit competition squeezes margins, or revisions worsen.

thesis: Largest private bank, attractively valued as merger-integration drags fade; a low-beta anchor for the book.
falsification: Deposit growth and margins disappoint or loan growth stays sub-system.

thesis: State-bank proxy on the credit cycle, trading cheap with the best valuation z among large banks.
falsification: Credit costs normalize up, treasury hits, or PSU re-rating stalls.

thesis: Consistent execution mid-cap bank with improving ROA and a slight cheapness edge.
falsification: NIM compression or asset-quality deterioration.

thesis: Best-in-class consumer-finance compounder; hold at a moderate weight while revisions are only middling.
falsification: Growth decelerates, credit costs rise, or AUM-mix deteriorates.

thesis: Capital-markets infrastructure compounding with rising SIP/MF flows; an annuity on Indian financialization.
falsification: MF AUM growth stalls or pricing/regulatory pressure on RTA fees.

thesis: Listed AMC levered to equity-AUM growth, but revisions are softening, so trim from an overweight.
falsification: Net flows or market-share slip, or revisions deteriorate further.

thesis: Dominant jewellery/lifestyle franchise with steady premiumization; a core consumer-discretionary holding.
falsification: Gold-price volatility hits jewellery margins or studded-mix slows.

thesis: Low-cost grocery retailer with a long store-expansion runway; structural retail compounder.
falsification: Online-grocery competition erodes throughput or like-for-like growth slows.

thesis: Capacity-expanding regulated utility with a green-energy option and dependable regulated returns; defensive ballast.
falsification: Capex slips, receivables stretch, or the green pivot disappoints.

thesis: Consolidated telecom with rising ARPU and improving free cash flow; structural pricing power.
falsification: A tariff war reignites or ARPU growth stalls.

thesis: Diversified conglomerate with consumer and energy-transition optionality at a reasonable valuation; manage benchmark risk.
falsification: Refining margins compress and retail/Jio monetization disappoints.

thesis: SUV and tractor leader with strong product cycle and capital discipline; core autos.
falsification: SUV demand cools, tractor cycle turns, or EV capex weighs on returns.

thesis: Top-tier IT services with a slight valuation edge; benchmark-aware hold awaiting a demand recovery.
falsification: Discretionary demand stays weak or deal momentum and margins disappoint.

thesis: Engine and power-systems leader geared to the domestic capex and data-center cycle; structural industrial.
falsification: Industrial capex slows or export/genset demand softens.

thesis: Staples compounder for downside protection; hold modestly as a low-beta defensive.
falsification: Rural demand stays weak or premiumization and margins disappoint.

thesis: Grooming-category leader with pricing power and high returns on capital; defensive consumer.
falsification: Volume growth stalls or input costs compress margins.

thesis: Asset-light value-commerce platform with a long runway; hold at a moderate weight rather than an outsize bet given uncertain profitability.
falsification: Take-rates or GMV growth disappoint, or path to profitability slips.

thesis: Category-leading food delivery plus a scaling quick-commerce option; structural consumer-internet.
falsification: Quick-commerce cash burn rises or delivery growth and margins slow.

thesis: Marketplace for home services with network effects, but revisions are softening, so keep small.
falsification: Unit economics or take-rates deteriorate, or revisions keep falling.

thesis: Specialty and generics leader with a growing branded book; core pharma anchor.
falsification: Specialty ramp slows, US pricing worsens, or a regulatory issue hits.

thesis: Contract development/manufacturing player riding the China-plus-one pharma shift; structural growth.
falsification: Order book or client wins slow, or margin ramp disappoints.

thesis: Vaccines and branded portfolio with high returns on capital; steady defensive pharma.
falsification: Vaccine demand softens or the portfolio loses traction.

thesis: Hospital and diagnostics network on a bed-expansion cycle, but revisions are deteriorating, so cut back.
falsification: Occupancy/ARPOB momentum slows, or revisions keep falling.

thesis: Thermal capacity with merchant tailwinds, but revisions are now falling, so de-risk a large cyclical position.
falsification: Merchant tariffs/PLFs soften, leverage concerns resurface, or revisions worsen.

thesis: Pump and fluid-systems maker geared to water and infrastructure capex; structural industrial.
falsification: Order inflows or margins disappoint.

thesis: Digital-engineering mid-cap growing above tier-1 peers; structural IT exposure.
falsification: Growth premium compresses or deal momentum slows.

thesis: Owner of premium hotels and annuity real estate in a strong RevPAR cycle; structural leisure.
falsification: RevPAR cycle turns or new-supply pressure hits room rates.

thesis: Integrated sugar and ethanol producer geared to the blending mandate; hold at moderate size.
falsification: Ethanol pricing/policy turns adverse or cane economics worsen.

thesis: NBFC pivoting to a high-return retail book with a slight cheapness edge.
falsification: Retail-mix shift stalls or credit costs rise.

thesis: Granular secured MSME/LAP lender with a long growth runway.
falsification: Asset quality slips or growth decelerates.

thesis: Tech-first general insurer scaling distribution, but revisions are falling, so keep small.
falsification: Combined ratio worsens or growth and revisions keep deteriorating.

thesis: Home and personal-care franchise with international exposure, but revisions are softening, so reduce.
falsification: Volume recovery stalls or revisions keep falling.

thesis: Branded-generics and biosimilars maker with export exposure, but revisions are deteriorating, so cut back.
falsification: Domestic growth slows, export pricing worsens, or revisions keep falling.

thesis: Largest cement maker on a consolidation/pricing up-cycle, but revisions are falling, so keep underweight.
falsification: Cement prices stay weak or revisions keep deteriorating.

thesis: Safety-content compounder on the commercial-vehicle cycle with a value tilt; hold at moderate size.
falsification: The CV cycle turns down or content-per-vehicle gains stall.

thesis: Brand-led electricals play on consumption and premiumization; small structural consumer-durables holding.
falsification: Volume growth stalls or margin pressure persists.

thesis: Upstream oil-and-gas major trading cheap with strong, rising analyst revisions; a value-with-revisions large-cap initiation.
falsification: Crude prices fall sharply, subsidy/windfall-tax risk returns, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Dominant life insurer trading cheap with strong, rising revisions as VNB margins improve; initiate a value-with-revisions financial.
falsification: VNB margins or persistency disappoint, or revisions turn down.

thesis: High-return, well-collateralized gold-loan franchise with strong, rising revisions amid a firm gold-price backdrop; initiate.
falsification: Gold prices fall hard, competitive pricing pressure intensifies, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Above-peer-growth IT services with strong, rising revisions and a healthy order book; add IT exposure on revisions.
falsification: Deal momentum slows, margins compress, or revisions turn down.

thesis: VSF, chemicals and a cement/paints stake at a holding-company discount with strong, rising revisions; initiate.
falsification: Paints-foray losses widen, core spreads compress, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Dominant decorative-paints franchise where strong, rising revisions suggest the competitive-intensity fear is peaking; contrarian quality initiation.
falsification: Market-share loss to new entrants accelerates or revisions turn down.

thesis: Sterile-injectables maker with a global B2B model and strong, rising revisions; initiate quality pharma.
falsification: Key approvals/launches slip, pricing worsens, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Lowest-cost iron-ore producer trading cheap with strong, rising revisions on firm steel demand; cyclical value initiation.
falsification: Iron-ore/steel prices fall, volume guidance is cut, or revisions reverse.

thesis: Integrated, low-cost zinc and silver producer with rising revisions and high dividend yield; cyclical income initiation.
falsification: Zinc/silver prices fall, costs rise, or revisions reverse.
